iotanalytics.channel.channelstorage.Cust.Docs: Used to store channel data in an S3 bucket that you manage. If customer managed storage is selected, the `retentionPeriod` parameter is ignored. You can't change the choice of S3 storage after the data store is created.

iotanalytics.channel.channelstorage.Serv.Docs: Used to store channel data in an S3 bucket managed by AWS IoT Analytics. You can't change the choice of S3 storage after the data store is created.
